# plato-src-legacy — FROZEN REFERENCE, DO NOT EDIT

This is a byte-for-byte snapshot of `plato-src/` taken on **2026-07-09**, the
moment the "content-leads" refactor began (author decision: keep the old library
as `plato-src-legacy` and continue improving `plato-src` directly).

- **Never edit these files.** They are the frozen pre-refactor baseline.
- **Never compile this folder.** The compiler and all gate scripts take `plato-src`
  as their explicit input; this directory is a reference only.
- Diff `plato-src` against this to see how far the library has moved
  (e.g. bug fixes, `Fraction`, type-surface changes, new content).

The pre-refactor library state also lives in git history; this copy is a
convenience for side-by-side diffing as `plato-src` evolves.

See `docs/plato-execution-plan-2026-07-09.md` (studio repo) for the plan that
starts here.
